products.name: Current Transformers
products.shortDescription: Current transformers up to 2500/5A ratio with accuracy class 0.5 & 1.0 and burden up to 30VA for metering and protection applications.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Current Transformers are designed for accurate current measurement, metering, and protection in LT and HT electrical systems. Available in ratios up to 2500/5A with Class 0.5 and Class 1.0 accuracy and burden ratings up to 30VA. Suitable for panel boards, switchgear, substations, DG panels, APFC panels, and energy monitoring systems. Manufactured under ISO 9001:2015 standards and compliant with IS 2705 and IEC 61869-2.
products.applicationNote: Suitable for indoor LT and HT panel applications requiring accurate current measurement and protection relay interfacing. Designed for long operational life and stable accuracy.

products.applicationNote: Verified for on-site and plant-based oil filtration and maintenance.

products.name: Control Transformers
products.shortDescription: Single and three-phase control transformers for industrial control panels, CNC machines, cranes, switchgear, and railway applications. Up to 30 KVA.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Control Transformers are dry-type, isolation transformers engineered to supply stable low-voltage power to industrial control circuits under high inrush conditions. Designed for relay panels, PLCs, motor starters, CNC machines, cranes, switchgear, and railway control cubicles. Available from 25 VA to 30 KVA in single and three-phase configurations, with Class B, F, and H insulation. 100% copper wound on CRGO core. Routine-tested before dispatch with test certificate. ISO 9001:2015 manufactured. Compliant with IS 11171 and IEC 61558.

technicalSpecifications.specification: Class B (130°C) / Class F (155°C) / Class H (180°C)
2 kV AC for 1 minute (winding to core/earth)

products.applicationNote: Verified for industrial control panel, CNC machine tool, crane, switchgear, railway, and substation applications. Designed for high inrush conditions (6–10× rated current) typical of relay and contactor energisation.

customizations.description: 25 VA / 50 VA / 100 VA / 250 VA / 500 VA / 1 KVA / 2 KVA / 5 KVA / 10 KVA / 15 KVA / 20 KVA / 25 KVA / 30 KVA (custom ratings available)
details: Smaller VA ratings (25–250 VA) for relay coil and pilot circuit supply
Mid-range (500 VA–5 KVA) for PLC panels and motor starters
Higher KVA (10–30 KVA) for large switchgear and multi-feeder panels
Custom intermediate KVA ratings engineered on request
High inrush capacity factor (200–1000%) available for heavy contactor loads
Single Phase: standard for most control circuits with 110V or 230V secondary
Three Phase: 415V primary, for large panels or multi-secondary configurations
Auto-transformer variant available for ±10% step-up/step-down applications
Standard secondary: 110V AC (most common for relay/contactor circuits)
24V AC secondary for PLC and safety relay circuits
Dual secondary winding: e.g. 415V primary → 230V + 110V simultaneously
Custom voltage ratios engineered on request
Voltage tappings: ±2.5% and ±5% of primary available
Copper: lower DC resistance, better conductivity, smaller size, longer life — preferred for all applications
Aluminium: lighter weight, lower cost — suitable for budget-sensitive builds
Both options fully specified and documented at order stage

customizations.description: Class B (130°C) / Class F (155°C) / Class H (180°C)
details: Class B: standard use, ambient temperature ≤40°C, well-ventilated panels
Class F: elevated ambient, VFD panels, steel plant environments
Class H: high-duty continuous, tropical / desert environments, railway applications
VPI (Vacuum Pressure Impregnation) treatment standard on Class F and H

products.name: Industrial Battery Chargers
products.shortDescription: Industrial battery chargers up to 30A output with support for 12V, 24V, 48V, and 110V systems. Compatible with Lead Acid, VRLA/SMF, Li-Ion, and NiCd batteries. IS 8320 compliant.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Industrial Battery Chargers are designed for reliable and efficient charging of stationary and traction battery banks in industrial environments. Available in output current ratings up to 30A and supporting system voltages of 12V, 24V, 48V, and 110V DC. Compatible with Lead Acid, VRLA/SMF, Lithium-Ion, and Nickel Cadmium battery chemistries. Features automatic charging with constant current / constant voltage (CC/CV) topology, overcharge protection, short circuit protection, and LED/digital status indication. Manufactured under ISO 9001:2015 standards and compliant with IS 8320.

products.applicationNote: Suitable for stationary and traction battery charging in industrial, utility, and infrastructure applications. Designed for continuous duty operation with automatic charge management and protection features.

products.name: Line Chokes
products.shortDescription: Single and three-phase line chokes up to 200A+ for VFD input/output, harmonic filtering, and power factor correction in industrial drive and power systems.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Line Chokes are designed to suppress harmonics, reduce EMI/RFI interference, and improve power quality in industrial drive and power conversion systems. Available in both single-phase and three-phase configurations with current ratings up to 200A and beyond. Suitable for installation on the input and output side of VFDs and inverters, APFC panels, and harmonic-sensitive distribution systems. Built with CRGO/ferrite cores and housed in robust MS enclosures. Manufactured under ISO 9001:2015 standards.

highlights.label: Application
highlights.value: VFD Input / Output / Harmonic Filter / APFC

technicalSpecifications.specification: Up to 30–45% reduction at VFD input
DIN Rail / Panel Mount / Floor Mount

products.applicationNote: Line chokes are recommended on VFD input to reduce harmonic distortion and protect upstream equipment, and on VFD output to suppress dV/dt spikes that degrade motor insulation. Also used in APFC panels to limit inrush current into capacitor banks.

details: Standard ratings: 6A, 10A, 16A, 25A, 32A, 50A, 63A, 100A, 150A, 200A
Custom ratings above 200A available on request
Matched to VFD or load full-load ampere (FLA) rating
Derated ratings available for high-ambient temperature sites
2% impedance for minimal voltage drop with moderate harmonic reduction
3% impedance for standard VFD input applications
4% and 5% for high harmonic distortion environments
Custom impedance values available for specific system requirements
Single-phase chokes for 230V AC single-phase drives and UPS
Three-phase chokes for 415V AC industrial VFD and motor drive systems
Balanced three-phase design for symmetrical impedance across all phases
Common-mode and differential-mode variants available

customizations.description: DIN Rail / Panel Mount / Floor Mount
details: DIN rail mount for compact drive panels up to 32A
Panel mount open-frame design for larger current ratings
Floor-standing MS enclosure for 100A and above
IP21 / IP42 enclosure protection options available

seo.metaDescription: Single and three-phase line chokes up to 200A for VFD input/output, harmonic filtering, and APFC panels. IS 5553 and IEC 61558 compliant. Alliance Engineering.

products.name: Automatic Voltage Stabilizers
products.shortDescription: Single-phase automatic voltage stabilizers with wide input range of 90V–300V and regulated 220V ±10% output. Available up to 4 KVA and above for home, commercial, and industrial use.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Automatic Voltage Stabilizers (AVS) provide reliable voltage regulation for sensitive equipment in areas with wide voltage fluctuation. Designed with a relay-switched autotransformer topology, they accept a wide input range of 90V to 300V AC and deliver a stable 220V ±10% output. Fitted with an analog voltmeter for real-time output monitoring, an input ON/OFF switch, and clearly labelled L-N-E terminal blocks for safe and easy wiring. Housed in a robust MS powder-coated white cabinet suitable for wall mounting. Manufactured and tested at Alliance Engineering Company under ISO 9001:2015 standards.
products.applicationNote: Ideal for areas with wide voltage fluctuations between 90V and 300V. The wide input range ensures uninterrupted equipment operation without manual intervention. Suitable for both domestic and light commercial loads.

details: 0.5 KVA and 1 KVA for single appliance protection
2 KVA and 4 KVA for home and small office use
Higher ratings available on request for commercial loads
Custom capacity matched to connected load requirements
Standard wide range: 90V–300V for high fluctuation zones
Narrow range variants (140V–260V) for urban supply areas
Custom input range available based on local grid conditions
Suitable for rural feeders with extreme voltage sag
Standard output: 220V ±10% for Indian mains equipment
230V output available for export or specific load requirements
Output voltage adjustable via internal preset (on select models)
Tight regulation variants (±5%) available for sensitive equipment
Standard wall-mount white MS powder-coated enclosure
Floor-standing cabinet for higher KVA ratings
Custom RAL colour finishes available on request
Ventilation slots for thermal management on larger units

seo.metaTitle: Automatic Voltage Stabilizers up to 4 KVA | Alliance Engineering Company
seo.metaDescription: Single-phase automatic voltage stabilizers with 90V–300V input range and 220V ±10% output. Up to 4 KVA. IS 9815 compliant. Manufactured by Alliance Engineering Company.

products.name: Frequency Meters
products.shortDescription: Panel-mount vibrating reed frequency meters (45–55 Hz) with 230/440V input, Class 0.3 accuracy, and 72mm flush-mount housing. IS 1248 compliant. Model SR-72.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Frequency Meters are vibrating reed type panel instruments designed for accurate visual indication of AC system frequency. The reed elements vibrate in resonance with the supply frequency, allowing direct reading on a calibrated 45–55 Hz scale without requiring any external power supply or signal conditioning. Available in 72mm flush-mount format (Model SR-72) with input voltage compatibility of 230V and 440V AC. Accuracy Class 0.3 as per IS 1248. Suitable for switchgear panels, DG synchronization panels, substations, and industrial power distribution boards. Manufactured by Alliance (India) under ISO 9001:2015 standards.

technicalSpecifications.specification: Flush Panel Mount with rear clamp
Black Thermoplastic Bezel with White Dial Face

products.applicationNote: Vibrating reed frequency meters require no auxiliary power supply — they operate directly from the measured circuit. Ideal for DG synchronization where real-time frequency comparison between mains and generator is critical. The dual-sided scale allows reading from both above and below the panel.

details: 230V AC for single-phase panel instruments
440V AC for three-phase switchgear and MCC panels
Both voltage variants use the same 72mm housing
Custom input voltage ratings available on request
Standard Indian grid range: 45–55 Hz centred at 50 Hz
Custom ranges available for 60 Hz systems (export)
Narrow range variants (48–52 Hz) for tighter grid monitoring
Scale markings at 2 Hz intervals for easy reading
SR-72: 72mm standard flush-mount format
SR-96: 96mm format available for larger panels
SR-144: 144mm format for control room consoles
All sizes use rear clamp flush-mount mechanism

seo.metaTitle: Frequency Meters SR-72 | 45–55 Hz Panel Mount | Alliance Engineering Company
seo.metaDescription: Vibrating reed panel frequency meters, 45–55 Hz, 230/440V input, Class 0.3 accuracy, 72mm flush mount. IS 1248 compliant. Model SR-72 by Alliance Engineering.

products.name: Industrial Buzzers
products.shortDescription: Round louvred industrial buzzers with LED indication for alarm and alert signalling in switchgear panels, substations, and industrial control systems.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Industrial Buzzers are robust round-body acoustic signalling devices designed for continuous duty alarm and alert applications in industrial environments. Featuring a louvred grey plastic enclosure for sound projection and an integrated LED status indicator, these buzzers provide both audible and visual alert simultaneously. Suitable for panel-mount and wall-mount installation in switchgear rooms, substations, DG control panels, process plants, and factory floors. Designed for long operational life with minimal maintenance under ISO 9001:2015 quality standards.
products.applicationNote: Industrial buzzers are typically wired to relay contact outputs of protection relays, PLCs, or annunciator modules. The integrated LED provides visual confirmation that the alarm signal is active, even in high-noise environments where the audible tone may be masked.

details: 230V AC for direct panel supply connection
24V DC for PLC and relay output driven systems
110V AC / 48V DC variants available on request

Sound level ≥ 85 dB at 1m on all variants

Red enclosure available for fire/emergency alarm applications
Yellow for caution/warning zone installations
Custom colours available on bulk orders

products.name: Electronic Hooters
products.shortDescription: Panel-mount electronic hooters in 72mm square format with ON LED indication for loud audible alarming in switchgear, MCC, and industrial control panels.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Electronic Hooters are panel-mount audible signalling devices designed for high-volume alarm and alert applications in industrial switchgear, MCC panels, and control rooms. Housed in a 72mm square black thermoplastic bezel with a white face plate, they feature a built-in speaker, an ON status LED indicator, and rear DIN-rail or panel-clamp mounting. Operated directly from AC supply or control voltage, these hooters produce a loud, penetrating tone suitable for noisy industrial environments. Branded as Alliance (India) and manufactured under ISO 9001:2015.

technicalSpecifications.specification: Black Thermoplastic Bezel, White Face Plate
Flush Panel Mount with rear clamp

products.applicationNote: Electronic hooters are wired to NO (normally open) relay contacts of protection relays, annunciator modules, or PLC digital outputs. The 72mm square form factor matches standard panel instrument cutouts, making retrofit installation straightforward alongside voltmeters, ammeters, and frequency meters.

products.name: Dimmerstat / Primary Current Injector Set
products.shortDescription: Variable autotransformer (dimmerstat) with integrated primary current injector set, 0–300V output, analog voltmeter and ammeter, and 25A MCB protection. Manufactured by Alliance Engineering Co.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Dimmerstat cum Primary Current Injector Set is a precision variable autotransformer unit used for testing, calibration, and commissioning of current transformers, protection relays, and metering equipment. The continuously variable rotary dial allows smooth adjustment of output voltage from 0 to 300V AC, while the high-ratio output transformer injects proportional primary current for CT ratio and burden testing. The front panel features an analog voltmeter (0–300V), an analog ammeter (0–300A), a Royal B-25 MCB for overload protection, a yellow power-on pilot lamp, and heavy-duty red output terminals. Housed in a robust grey MS powder-coated bench-mount enclosure. Manufactured and tested by Alliance Engineering Company under ISO 9001:2015.

technicalSpecifications.specification: Variable Autotransformer (Dimmerstat) with Primary Current Injection Output
Heavy-duty red insulated terminals (primary current output)

applications.label: CT Saturation and Magnetisation Curve Testing

products.applicationNote: The primary current injector set is used to inject a known primary current through the CT under test, allowing verification of CT ratio accuracy, polarity, burden, and saturation characteristics. The dimmerstat provides smooth, stepless control of the injected current making it ideal for precise relay pickup and drop-off testing.

details: Standard range: 0–300A for LT CT testing up to 2500/5A ratio
0–500A and 0–1000A variants available for higher ratio CTs

Output current determined by injection transformer ratio

products.name: Variable Transformers
products.shortDescription: Single and three-phase variable autotransformers (dimmerstats) with continuously variable 0–270V output, available in multiple current ratings and bench-mount or panel-mount configurations.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Variable Transformers (also known as Dimmerstats or Variacs) are continuously variable autotransformers designed for smooth, stepless control of AC output voltage from 0V to 270V (single phase) or 0–470V (three phase). Available in a wide range of current ratings from 2A to custom high-current configurations, and in both single-phase and three-phase versions. Supplied as standalone bench-mount tabletop units or integrated panel-mount assemblies with analog voltmeter, ammeter, MCB protection, and pilot indication. Widely used in laboratories, test benches, production lines, and industrial process control wherever precise voltage variation is required. Manufactured under ISO 9001:2015 standards by Alliance Engineering Company.

technicalSpecifications.specification: Continuously variable rotary dial with graduated scale
MS Powder Coated Cabinet (bench) / Open Frame (panel)

products.applicationNote: Variable transformers provide true sine wave output with no harmonic distortion, making them preferable over phase-angle controllers for sensitive load testing. The toroidal core design ensures high efficiency and low leakage flux. For current injection applications, pair with Alliance Engineering Primary Current Injector Sets.

details: 2A and 5A for bench-top laboratory and light load use
10A and 15A for standard test bench and process applications
20A for heavier loads and motor testing setups
Custom ratings above 20A available — specify load requirements at time of order

products.name: Analog Ammeters
products.shortDescription: Panel-mount analog ammeters for AC and DC current measurement in 72mm, 96mm, and 144mm formats. Class 1.5 accuracy, IS 1248 compliant. Suitable for switchgear, MCC, and industrial control panels.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Analog Ammeters are moving iron (AC) and moving coil (DC) panel instruments designed for accurate current measurement in industrial switchgear, MCC panels, distribution boards, DG panels, and control rooms. Available in 72mm, 96mm, and 144mm flush-mount square formats with a wide range of full-scale deflection ratings from 1A to 3000A (via external CT). Class 1.5 accuracy as per IS 1248 with clear, easy-to-read white dial faces and black pointer. Suitable for both AC and DC measurement applications. Manufactured by Alliance (India) under ISO 9001:2015 standards.

technicalSpecifications.specification: 1A to 100A (direct) / up to 3000A via external CT (5A secondary)
Flush Panel Mount with rear clamp
White with black scale markings and pointer

products.applicationNote: For AC current ranges above 100A, an external current transformer (CT) with 5A secondary is used. The ammeter must never be connected directly to circuits above its direct input rating. CT-operated ammeters are labelled with the primary current range (e.g. 200/5A) on the dial. DC ammeters use a shunt resistor for ranges above the meter's basic movement rating.

details: Direct reading: 1A, 2A, 5A, 10A, 20A, 50A, 100A
CT operated: 100/5A to 3000/5A (custom ratio available)
Dual scale dials available for multi-ratio CT applications
Custom full-scale deflection available on request

products.name: Analog Voltmeters
products.shortDescription: Panel-mount analog voltmeters for AC and DC voltage measurement in 72mm, 96mm, and 144mm formats. Class 1.5 accuracy, IS 1248 compliant. Suitable for switchgear, MCC, DG, and industrial control panels.
products.description: Alliance Engineering Analog Voltmeters are moving iron (AC) and moving coil (DC) panel instruments for accurate voltage measurement in industrial switchgear, MCC panels, DG panels, distribution boards, and control rooms. Available in 72mm, 96mm, and 144mm flush-mount square formats with full-scale voltage ranges from 30V to 600V AC and 30V to 500V DC (higher ranges via external PT). Class 1.5 accuracy as per IS 1248 with white dial face and black pointer for clear readability. Manufactured by Alliance (India) under ISO 9001:2015 standards.

technicalSpecifications.specification: Up to 33kV and above via external PT (110V secondary)
Flush Panel Mount with rear clamp
White with black scale markings and pointer

products.applicationNote: For HT system voltage measurement above 600V AC, an external potential transformer (PT) with 110V secondary is used. The voltmeter is then scaled to read the primary voltage directly on the dial (e.g. 11kV / 33kV). DC voltmeters use moving coil mechanism and must be connected with correct polarity.

customizations.description: 30V to 600V AC / 500V DC (direct) / HT via PT
details: Standard AC ranges: 150V, 300V, 415V, 500V, 600V
Standard DC ranges: 30V, 75V, 150V, 300V, 500V
PT operated: 11kV, 22kV, 33kV and above (110V PT secondary)
Custom full-scale voltage available on request
AC moving iron type for 50Hz industrial switchgear panels
DC moving coil (PMMC) for battery, rectifier, and DC drive panels
Both types available in all panel sizes
Specify AC or DC at time of order
72mm (SR-72): compact and space-constrained panels
96mm (SR-96): standard industrial and MCC panel format
144mm (SR-144): control room consoles and easy-read dashboards
All sizes use flush rear-clamp panel mounting
Class 1.5 for general industrial panel voltage monitoring
Class 1.0 for precision metering and energy monitoring applications
Class 2.5 economy variant for non-critical indication
Specify accuracy class at time of order

seo.metaTitle: Analog Voltmeters AC DC | 72mm 96mm 144mm Panel Mount | Alliance Engineering
seo.metaDescription: Panel-mount analog voltmeters for AC and DC, Class 1.5, 72mm to 144mm, 30V to 600V AC direct and HT via PT. IS 1248 compliant. Moving iron and moving coil. Alliance Engineering.
